parameters.query: SELECT 'keine_preise' AS check_type, sa.product_slot_key AS key, p.name || ' (' || m.machine_key || ')' AS name, 'Aktiver Slot ohne Preis: ' || p.name AS message FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id LEFT JOIN automatenlager.prices pr   ON pr.slot_assignment_id = sa.slot_assignment_id AND pr.valid_to IS NULL WHERE sa.active = TRUE AND pr.price_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'negative_qty', sb.batch_key, p.name, 'Negative Menge (' || sb.remaining_qty || ') fuer: ' || p.name FROM automatenlager.stock_batches sb JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sb.product_id WHERE sb.remaining_qty < 0 AND sb.status IN ('aktiv','active','reserve') UNION ALL SELECT 'wf3_stale', workflow_key, workflow_key, 'WF3 seit ' || ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-updated_at))/60,1) || ' Min nicht gelaufen' FROM automatenlager.workflow_state WHERE workflow_key = 'WF3_NAYAX_FIFO'   AND (updated_at IS NULL OR updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes') UNION ALL SELECT 'alte_warnungen', warning_type || '_count', warning_type, COUNT(*) || ' ungeloeste Warnungen (Typ: ' || warning_type || ') aelter 7 Tage' FROM automatenlager.warnings WHERE resolved = FALSE AND severity != 'info'   AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY warning_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'pending_proposals', proposal_key, COALESCE(reason,'?'), 'Proposal seit ' || EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW()-created_at)::int || ' Tagen offen: ' || COALESCE(reason,'?') FROM automatenlager.product_change_proposals WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY check_type, key

SELECT 'keine_preise' AS check_type, sa.product_slot_key AS key, p.name || ' (' || m.machine_key || ')' AS name, 'Aktiver Slot ohne Preis: ' || p.name AS message FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id LEFT JOIN automatenlager.prices pr   ON pr.slot_assignment_id = sa.slot_assignment_id AND pr.valid_to IS NULL WHERE sa.active = TRUE AND pr.price_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'negative_qty', sb.batch_key, p.name, 'Negative Menge (' || sb.remaining_qty || ') fuer: ' || p.name FROM automatenlager.stock_batches sb JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sb.product_id WHERE sb.remaining_qty < 0 AND sb.status IN ('aktiv','active','reserve') UNION ALL SELECT 'wf3_stale', workflow_key, workflow_key, 'WF3 seit ' || ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-updated_at))/60,1) || ' Min nicht gelaufen' FROM automatenlager.workflow_state WHERE workflow_key = 'WF3_NAYAX_FIFO'   AND (updated_at IS NULL OR updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes') UNION ALL SELECT 'alte_warnungen', warning_type || '_count', warning_type, COUNT(*) || ' ungeloeste Warnungen (Typ: ' || warning_type || ') aelter 7 Tage' FROM automatenlager.warnings WHERE resolved = FALSE AND severity != 'info'   AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY warning_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'pending_proposals', proposal_key, COALESCE(reason,'?'), 'Proposal seit ' || EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW()-created_at)::int || ' Tagen offen: ' || COALESCE(reason,'?') FROM automatenlager.product_change_proposals WHERE status = 'pending' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY check_type, key
